
# Scientific and Philosophical Limits

## Chapter Purpose

Discuss falsifiability, epistemology, explanatory gaps, subjectivity, and the limitations of scientific approaches to consciousness.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
